历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14870 → 14015 → 15025 → 16263 → 13376, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift (16263rd), and in 2025, it rebounded sharply to 13376th, with a fluctuation range of about 2887 positions in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 13376th. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 2862 → 2825 → 2816 → 2809 → 2793, decreasing slightly year by year. The 2026 plan is 2795, an increase of only 2 compared to 2025, essentially flat, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been approximately 27 → 25 → 26 → 30 → 31 → 32 in recent years, firmly within the top 35 nationally, belonging to the core 985 tier. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 9 disciplines rated A- or above: Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength, providing sustained appeal to provincial candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to a campus voyeurism incident (35 related records, 34 negative), which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 87 (average), with low short video exposure. No historical record of admission cutoff drops.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.59%) compared to 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, one of the strongest 985 universities in Guangdong Province, with a high proportion of provincial enrollment (approximately 2,793 in Physics Category in 2025), leading to strong willingness among provincial candidates to apply, with significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound trend in 2025 rankings, the increase in candidate numbers in 2026 (intensified competition), the essentially flat enrollment plan, and the sustained appeal of the university's engineering strength, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly advance from the 2025 baseline of 13,376. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13,352, with a range of 12,852 to 13,852.

If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 13,852), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; consistently ranked among the top 35 nationally on the Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level. 预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward trend in 2025 rankings, a substantial increase in examinees in 2026 (+11.64%), an enrollment expansion of only 4.55% (net competition intensification), and the sustained appeal of the 985 brand, the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is expected to slightly advance from the 2025 baseline of 2597th.
